We applied descriptive statistics to analyze the prevalence of tools and anti-patterns, and our findings show that most tools are executed and integrated using an external script; in addition, \textit{Absent Feedback} is the most common configuration anti-pattern. We believe that researchers and practitioners can use the evidence of this study to further investigate how to improve both the tools that are integrated in CI/CD and the integration practices.

</details>


### [792] [Vibe-driven model-based engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10645)
*Jordi Cabot*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出"氛围驱动模型工程"新方法，结合AI驱动的氛围编码与模型驱动工程，为不同类型软件系统提供互补开发路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件系统需求增长和复杂性增加需要更好的开发方法和工具。传统模型驱动工程(MDE)面临模型复杂性挑战，而新兴的基于LLM的氛围编码存在代码漏洞、可扩展性和可维护性问题。两者各有优劣，需要寻找互补方案。

Method: 提出"氛围驱动模型工程"概念，整合AI和MDE的优势。通过将大型语言模型的自然语言处理能力与模型驱动工程的规范性和可靠性相结合，为不同类型软件系统、开发场景和用户提供不同的开发路径。

Result: 提出了新的集成方法框架，明确了氛围驱动模型工程的关键概念。该方法旨在加速可靠复杂系统的开发，同时指出了该方法带来的机遇和未来面临的开放挑战。

Conclusion: 氛围编码不会取代模型驱动工程，两者可以互补。氛围驱动模型工程作为整合AI和MDE的新方法，有望推动软件开发未来发展，但需要解决相关挑战以实现其潜力。

Abstract: There is a pressing need for better development methods and tools to keep up with the growing demand and increasing complexity of new software systems. New types of user interfaces, the need for intelligent components, sustainability concerns, etc. bring new challenges that we need to handle. In the last years, model-driven engineering (MDE), including its latest incarnation, i.e. low/no-code development, has been key to improving the quality and productivity of software development, but models themselves are becoming increasingly complex to specify and manage. At the same time, we are witnessing the growing popularity of vibe coding approaches that rely on Large Language Models (LLMs) to transform natural language descriptions into running code at the expense of potential code vulnerabilities, scalability issues and maintainability concerns.
  While many may think vibe coding will replace model-based engineering, in this paper we argue that, in fact, the two approaches can complement each other and provide altogether different development paths for different types of software systems, development scenarios, and user profiles. In this sense, we introduce the concept of \textit{vibe-driven model-based engineering} as a novel approach to integrate the best of both worlds (AI and MDE) to accelerate the development of reliable complex systems. We outline the key concepts of this new approach and highlight the opportunities and open challenges it presents for the future of software development.

</details>


### [793] [DynamicsLLM: a Dynamic Analysis-based Tool for Generating Intelligent Execution Traces Using LLMs to Detect Android Behavioural Code Smells](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10661)
*Houcine Abdelkader Cherief,Florent Avellaneda,Naouel Moha*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: DynamicsLLM：结合LLM智能生成执行轨迹的Android行为代码异味检测工具，相比现有工具Dynamics覆盖更多代码异味相关事件


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有最佳工具Dynamics在检测Android行为代码异味时存在高假阴性率，许多代码异味实例未被检测到。LLM在多个研究领域取得显著进展，为智能生成执行轨迹提供了潜力，特别是用于检测Android移动应用中的行为代码异味。

Method: 提出DynamicsLLM：1) 基于Dynamics方法的增强实现，利用LLM智能生成执行轨迹；2) 针对活动较少应用的新混合方法，提高代码异味相关事件覆盖率；3) 在333个F-DROID应用上全面验证。

Result: 在有限操作次数下，配置100% LLM的DynamicsLLM覆盖的代码异味相关事件是Dynamics的3倍；混合方法对活动较少应用将LLM覆盖率提高25.9%；12.7%的Dynamics无法触发的代码异味相关事件被成功触发。

Conclusion: DynamicsLLM通过结合LLM智能生成执行轨迹，显著提高了Android行为代码异味的检测覆盖率，特别是在活动较少的应用中，为移动应用代码质量分析提供了更有效的工具。

Abstract: Mobile apps have become essential of our daily lives, making code quality a critical concern for developers. Behavioural code smells are characteristics in the source code that induce inappropriate code behaviour during execution, which negatively impact software quality in terms of performance, energy consumption, and memory. Dynamics, the latest state-of-the-art tool-based method, is highly effective at detecting Android behavioural code smells. While it outperforms static analysis tools, it suffers from a high false negative rate, with multiple code smell instances remaining undetected. Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved notable advances across numerous research domains and offer significant potential for generating intelligent execution traces, particularly for detecting behavioural code smells in Android mobile applications. By intelligent execution trace, we mean a sequence of events generated by specific actions in a way that triggers the identification of a given behaviour. We propose the following three main contributions in this paper: (1) DynamicsLLM, an enhanced implementation of the Dynamics method that leverages LLMs to intelligently generate execution traces. (2) A novel hybrid approach designed to improve the coverage of code smell-related events in applications with a small number of activities. (3) A comprehensive validation of DynamicsLLM on 333 mobile applications from F-DROID, including a comparison with the Dynamics tool. Our results show that, under a limited number of actions, DynamicsLLM configured with 100% LLM covers three times more code smell-related events than Dynamics. The hybrid approach improves LLM coverage by 25.9% for apps containing few activities. Moreover, 12.7% of the code smell-related events that cannot be triggered by Dynamics are successfully triggered by our tool.

</details>


### [794] [Engineering Students' Usage and Perceptions of GitHub Copilot in Open-Source Projects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10747)
*Neha Rani,Jeevan Ram Munnangi,Austin Matthew Spangler,Donald Honeycutt*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 学生使用GitHub Copilot时，聊天功能和代码生成功能最常用，性别、编程熟练度和AI熟悉度影响功能使用


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI编程助手在IDE中的集成日益普及，特别是GitHub Copilot等工具改变了编程流程，但不同用户（尤其是计算机科学学生）如何使用这些工具及其效果尚未充分研究

Method: 通过探索性调查问卷研究，参与者在课程中使用GitHub Copilot完成开源项目任务后填写问卷，分析各功能使用情况和感知有用性，并基于人口统计因素探索使用差异

Result: 学生最常使用GitHub Copilot的聊天功能和代码生成功能；性别、编程熟练度和AI熟悉度显著影响在完成开源项目贡献时对Copilot功能的使用

Conclusion: AI编程助手的使用模式存在个体差异，特别是对于编程学习者，需要考虑人口统计因素来优化工具设计和教育应用

Abstract: The evolution of LLM has resulted in coding-focused models that are able to produce code snippets with high accuracy. More and more AI coding assistant tools are now available, leading to greater integration of AI coding assistants into integrated development environments (IDEs). These tools introduce new possibilities for enhancing software development workflows and changing programming processes. GitHub Copilot, a popular AI coding assistant, offers features including inline code autocompletion, comment-driven code generation, repository-aware suggestions, and a chat interface for code explanation and debugging. Different users use these tools differently due to differences in their perception, prior experience, and demographics. Furthermore, differences in feature use may affect users' programming process and skills, especially for programming learners such as computer science students. While prior work has evaluated the performance of LLM-driven code generation tools, their use and usefulness for developers, especially computer science students, remain underexplored. For our investigation, we conducted an exploratory survey-based study in which participants completed a survey after completing an open-source project issue using GitHub Copilot as part of a course. We analyzed students' use of each feature and their perceived usefulness. Further, we explore and analyze significant differences in GitHub Copilot usage and students' perceptions of it based on demographic factors. Our results show that students used the GitHub Copilot chat feature and code generation feature more than other features. Gender, programming proficiency, and familiarity with AI impacted the usage of the GitHub Copilot feature for assistance in completing the open-source project contribution.

</details>


### [795] [Improving Dynamic Specification Inference with LLM-Generated Counterexamples](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10761)
*Agustín Balestra,Agustín Nolasco,Facundo Molina,Diego Garbervetsky,Renzo Degiovanni,Nazareno Aguirre*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 使用大语言模型生成测试用例来验证动态分析推断的契约断言，提高断言质量并减少人工筛选负担


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 契约断言（前置条件、后置条件、不变量）对软件开发很重要，但手动编写困难。动态分析工具（如Daikon）可以从执行轨迹推断断言，但依赖测试套件的多样性，当测试不够多样时会产生大量无效断言（假阳性），需要人工筛选。

Method: 探索使用大语言模型自动生成测试用例，试图使生成的断言失效。将LLM生成的反例纳入动态分析过程，提高推断规范的精度。

Result: 最先进的LLM可以生成有效的反例，帮助剔除SpecFuzzer推断的无效断言达11.68%。将这些LLM生成的反例纳入动态分析过程后，相对于评估基准中的真实情况，推断规范的精度提高了7%，且不影响召回率。

Conclusion: LLM生成的反例可以有效提高动态分析推断契约断言的质量，减少无效断言，降低人工筛选负担，为契约断言的自动生成提供了有前景的改进方向。

Abstract: Contract assertions, such as preconditions, postconditions, and invariants, play a crucial role in software development, enabling applications such as program verification, test generation, and debugging. Despite their benefits, the adoption of contract assertions is limited, due to the difficulty of manually producing such assertions. Dynamic analysis-based approaches, such as Daikon, can aid in this task by inferring expressive assertions from execution traces. However, a fundamental weakness of these methods is their reliance on the thoroughness of the test suites used for dynamic analysis. When these test suites do not contain sufficiently diverse tests, the inferred assertions are often not generalizable, leading to a high rate of invalid candidates (false positives) that must be manually filtered out.
  In this paper, we explore the use of large language models (LLMs) to automatically generate tests that attempt to invalidate generated assertions. Our results show that state-of-the-art LLMs can generate effective counterexamples that help to discard up to 11.68\% of invalid assertions inferred by SpecFuzzer. Moreover, when incorporating these LLM-generated counterexamples into the dynamic analysis process, we observe an improvement of up to 7\% in precision of the inferred specifications, with respect to the ground-truths gathered from the evaluation benchmarks, without affecting recall.

</details>


### [796] [VulWeaver: Weaving Broken Semantics for Grounded Vulnerability Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10767)
*Yiheng Cao,Yihao Chen,Xin Hu,Bihuan Chen,Jiayi Deng,Zhuotong Zhou,Susheng Wu,Yiheng Huang,Xueying Du,Xingman Chen,Miaohua Li,Xin Peng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: VulWeaver：一种基于LLM的漏洞检测方法，通过整合确定性规则与LLM语义推理构建增强的统一依赖图，结合显式和隐式上下文提取完整漏洞信息，使用元提示和多数投票实现系统化推理，在多个基准测试中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统静态分析工具构建的程序表示不准确，现有基于LLM的方法往往缺乏关键漏洞上下文和基于事实的推理能力，导致漏洞检测效果有限。

Method: 1. 构建增强的统一依赖图（UDG）：整合确定性规则与LLM语义推理；2. 提取完整漏洞上下文：结合程序切片显式上下文与使用、定义、声明等隐式上下文；3. 元提示引导推理：使用漏洞类型特定专家指南引导LLM进行系统化推理，通过多数投票聚合结果。

Result: 在PrimeVul4J数据集上F1分数达0.75，分别比最先进的基于学习、基于LLM和基于代理的方法高出23%、15%和60%；在9个真实Java项目中检测到26个真实漏洞，其中15个获开发者确认，5个获得CVE标识；在工业部署中识别出40个已确认漏洞。

Conclusion: VulWeaver通过整合程序语义修复、完整上下文提取和系统化推理，显著提升了源代码漏洞检测的准确性和实用性，在实际应用和工业部署中表现出色。

Abstract: Detecting vulnerabilities in source code remains critical yet challenging, as conventional static analysis tools construct inaccurate program representations, while existing LLM-based approaches often miss essential vulnerability context and lack grounded reasoning. To mitigate these challenges, we introduce VulWeaver, a novel LLM-based approach that weaves broken program semantics into accurate representations and extracts holistic vulnerability context for grounded vulnerability detection. Specifically, VulWeaver first constructs an enhanced unified dependency graph (UDG) by integrating deterministic rules with LLM-based semantic inference to address static analysis inaccuracies. It then extracts holistic vulnerability context by combining explicit contexts from program slicing with implicit contexts, including usage, definition, and declaration information. Finally, VulWeaver employs meta-prompting with vulnerability type specific expert guidelines to steer LLMs through systematic reasoning, aggregated via majority voting for robustness. Extensive experiments on PrimeVul4J dataset have demonstrated that VulWeaver achieves a F1-score of 0.75, outperforming state-of-the-art learning-based, LLM-based, and agent-based baselines by 23%, 15%, and 60% in F1-score, respectively. VulWeaver has also detected 26 true vulnerabilities across 9 realworld Java projects, with 15 confirmed by developers and 5 CVE identifiers assigned. In industrial deployment, VulWeaver identified 40 confirmed vulnerabilities in an internal repository.

</details>


### [797] [Enhancing Understandability and Transparency of Research Software: Tracing Research to Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10793)
*Adrian Bajraktari,Andreas Vogelsang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出基于LLM的自動化工具，生成論文研究想法與實現代碼之間的追蹤映射，幫助新人快速上手和會議評審評估複製包


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 現代研究嚴重依賴軟體，但研究人員面臨理解特定領域複雜軟體的挑戰。針對新人長時間上手和會議評審評估複製包兩種情境，需要建立論文想法與實現代碼之間的清晰連結

Method: 提出基於大型語言模型的自動化工具，輸入論文和實現該論文的軟體代碼，自動生成研究想法與代碼位置之間的追蹤映射

Result: 初步實驗顯示該工具能夠生成相當有用的映射關係

Conclusion: LLM-based工具可作為節省時間和人力的方法，顯著改善研究軟體理解問題，幫助研究人員更快理解複雜軟體系統

Abstract: Modern research heavily relies on software. A significant challenge researchers face is understanding the complex software used in specific research fields. We target two scenarios in this context, namely long onboarding times for newcomers and conference reviewers evaluating replication packages. We hypothesize that both scenarios can be significantly improved when there is a clear link between the paper's ideas and the code that implements them. As a time- and staff-saving approach, we propose an LLM-based automation tool that takes in a paper and the software implementing the paper, and generates a trace mapping between research ideas and their locations in code. Initial experiments have shown that the tool can generate quite useful mappings.

</details>


### [798] [Verify Before You Fix: Agentic Execution Grounding for Trustworthy Cross-Language Code Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10800)
*Jugal Gajjar*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一个基于执行验证的LLM驱动漏洞分析框架，通过统一抽象语法树实现跨语言检测，结合执行验证确保修复可靠性，显著提升漏洞分析准确性和跨语言泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于概率推理的AI分类器在代理管道中存在可靠性问题：预测未经验证，导致下游阶段错误累积。软件漏洞分析使这一问题具体可测量，需要建立执行验证的闭环推理机制。

Method: 构建跨语言漏洞生命周期框架，包含三个LLM驱动阶段：混合结构语义检测、执行验证的代理验证、验证感知的迭代修复。使用统一抽象语法树(uAST)将Java、Python、C++标准化，结合GraphSAGE和Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B嵌入的双向门控融合，提供内在可解释性。

Result: 框架实现89.84-92.02%的语种内检测准确率和74.43-80.12%的零样本跨语言F1分数，端到端解决69.74%的漏洞，总失败率12.27%。消融实验显示：移除uAST使跨语言F1下降23.42%，禁用验证使不必要修复增加131.7%。

Conclusion: 执行验证的闭环推理是构建可信赖LLM驱动代理AI的原则性和实际可部署机制，显著提升漏洞分析的可靠性和跨语言泛化能力。

Abstract: Learned classifiers deployed in agentic pipelines face a fundamental reliability problem: predictions are probabilistic inferences, not verified conclusions, and acting on them without grounding in observable evidence leads to compounding failures across downstream stages. Software vulnerability analysis makes this cost concrete and measurable. We address this through a unified cross-language vulnerability lifecycle framework built around three LLM-driven reasoning stages-hybrid structural-semantic detection, execution-grounded agentic validation, and validation-aware iterative repair-governed by a strict invariant: no repair action is taken without execution-based confirmation of exploitability. Cross-language generalization is achieved via a Universal Abstract Syntax Tree (uAST) normalizing Java, Python, and C++ into a shared structural schema, combined with a hybrid fusion of GraphSAGE and Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B embeddings through learned two-way gating, whose per-sample weights provide intrinsic explainability at no additional cost. The framework achieves 89.84-92.02% intra-language detection accuracy and 74.43-80.12% zero-shot cross-language F1, resolving 69.74% of vulnerabilities end-to-end at a 12.27% total failure rate. Ablations establish necessity: removing uAST degrades cross-language F1 by 23.42%, while disabling validation increases unnecessary repairs by 131.7%. These results demonstrate that execution-grounded closed-loop reasoning is a principled and practically deployable mechanism for trustworthy LLM-driven agentic AI.

</details>


### [799] [LLMs for Qualitative Data Analysis Fail on Security-specificComments in Human Experiments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10834)
*Maria Camporese,Fabio Massacci,Yuanjun Gong*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LLMs作为安全评论自动标注器的效果有限，虽然详细代码描述能提升性能，但仍不足以可靠替代人类标注者


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类实验中的自由文本理由分析能提供重要定性见解，但人工标注成本高昂。LLMs似乎是替代人类标注者的理想候选，但安全特定方面（代码标识符、代码行、安全关键词）的编码可能需要比情感分类更深层的上下文理解

Method: 在LiveBench上提示四个表现最佳的LLMs，检测人类受试者在分析易受攻击代码片段时的自由文本评论中的九个安全相关代码。使用Cohen's Kappa（机会校正准确度）将输出与人类标注者进行比较。测试了模仿标注最佳实践的不同提示，包括新兴代码、带示例的详细代码本和冲突示例

Result: 仅在使用详细代码描述时观察到显著改进，但这些改进在不同代码间并不一致，且不足以可靠替代人类标注者

Conclusion: LLMs作为安全评论自动标注器的能力有限，需要更多LLMs和标注任务的进一步研究

Abstract: [Background:] Thematic analysis of free-text justifications in human experiments provides significant qualitative insights. Yet, it is costly because reliable annotations require multiple domain experts. Large language models (LLMs) seem ideal candidates to replace human annotators. [Problem:] Coding security-specific aspects (code identifiers mentioned, lines-of-code mentioned, security keywords mentioned) may require deeper contextual understanding than sentiment classification. [Objective:] Explore whether LLMs can act as automated annotators for technical security comments by human subjects. [Method:] We prompt four top-performing LLMs on LiveBench to detect nine security-relevant codes in free-text comments by human subjects analyzing vulnerable code snippets. Outputs are compared to human annotators using Cohen's Kappa (chance-corrected accuracy). We test different prompts mimicking annotation best practices, including emerging codes, detailed codebooks with examples, and conflicting examples. [Negative Results:] We observed marked improvements only when using detailed code descriptions; however, these improvements are not uniform across codes and are insufficient to reliably replace a human annotator. [Limitations:] Additional studies with more LLMs and annotation tasks are needed.

</details>


### [800] [Resilient Write: A Six-Layer Durable Write Surface for LLM Coding Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10842)
*Justice Owusu Agyemang,Jerry John Kponyo,Elliot Amponsah,Godfred Manu Addo Boakye,Kwame Opuni-Boachie Obour Agyekum*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出Resilient Write——一个MCP服务器，在AI编码代理和文件系统之间插入六层持久化写入表面，解决写入失败时代理无法获得结构化信号、丢失草稿和盲目重试的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM驱动的编码代理使用MCP等工具协议在开发者工作站上读写文件时，当写入失败（由于内容过滤器、截断或会话中断），代理通常无法获得结构化信号，丢失草稿，并浪费token盲目重试。

Method: 设计Resilient Write MCP服务器，在代理和文件系统之间插入六层持久化写入表面：预检风险评估、事务性原子写入、可恢复分块、结构化类型错误、带外暂存存储和任务连续性交接信封。这些层是正交且可独立采用的。

Result: 186个测试套件验证了每层的正确性，定量比较显示恢复时间减少5倍，代理自我纠正率提高13倍。系统还衍生出三个额外工具：分块预览、格式感知验证和日志分析。

Conclusion: Resilient Write通过六层持久化写入表面有效解决了LLM编码代理写入失败的问题，显著提高了恢复效率和代理自我纠正能力，已在MIT许可证下开源。

Abstract: LLM-powered coding agents increasingly rely on tool-use protocols such as the Model Context Protocol~(MCP) to read and write files on a developer's workstation. When a write fails -- due to content filters, truncation, or an interrupted session -- the agent typically receives no structured signal, loses the draft, and wastes tokens retrying blindly. We present \textbf{Resilient Write}, an MCP server that interposes a six-layer durable write surface between the agent and the filesystem. The layers -- pre-flight risk scoring, transactional atomic writes, resume-safe chunking, structured typed errors, out-of-band scratchpad storage, and task-continuity handoff envelopes -- are orthogonal and independently adoptable. Each layer maps to a concrete failure mode observed during a real agent session in April~2026, in which content-safety filters silently rejected a draft containing redacted API-key prefixes. Three additional tools -- chunk preview, format-aware validation, and journal analytics -- emerged from using the system to compose this paper. A 186-test suite validates correctness at each layer, and quantitative comparison against naive and defensive baselines shows a 5x reduction in recovery time and a 13x improvement in agent self-correction rate. Resilient Write is open-source under the MIT license.

</details>


### [801] [Ambiguity Detection and Elimination in Automated Executable Process Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10884)
*Ion Matei,Praveen Kumar Menaka Sekar,Maksym Zhenirovskyy,Hon Yung Wong,Sayuri Kohmura,Shinji Hotta,Akihiro Inomata*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出诊断驱动框架，通过重复生成和模拟检测自然语言规范是否支持稳定的可执行解释，而非证明单个BPMN模型的语义正确性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从自然语言规范自动生成可执行BPMN模型时，模糊或未充分指定的文本可能产生结构有效但模拟行为不同的模型，需要检测规范是否支持稳定的可执行解释

Method: 诊断驱动框架：1) 从关键绩效指标(KPIs)的经验分布检测行为不一致性；2) 使用基于模型的诊断定位网关逻辑分歧；3) 将逻辑映射回原文叙述段；4) 通过基于证据的细化修复源文本

Result: 在糖尿病肾病健康指导政策的实验中，该方法减少了重新生成模型行为的变异性，实现了在没有真实BPMN模型的情况下验证和修复可执行流程规范的闭环方法

Conclusion: 提出了一种闭环方法，用于在缺乏真实BPMN模型的情况下验证和修复可执行流程规范，通过诊断驱动框架确保自然语言规范支持稳定的可执行解释

Abstract: Automated generation of executable Business Process Model and Notation (BPMN) models from natural-language specifications is increasingly enabled by large language models. However, ambiguous or underspecified text can yield structurally valid models with different simulated behavior. Our goal is not to prove that one generated BPMN model is semantically correct, but to detect when a natural-language specification fails to support a stable executable interpretation under repeated generation and simulation. We present a diagnosis-driven framework that detects behavioral inconsistency from the empirical distribution of key performance indicators (KPIs), localizes divergence to gateway logic using model-based diagnosis, maps that logic back to verbatim narrative segments, and repairs the source text through evidence-based refinement. Experiments on diabetic nephropathy health-guidance policies show that the method reduces variability in regenerated model behavior. The result is a closed-loop approach for validating and repairing executable process specifications in the absence of ground-truth BPMN models.

</details>


### [802] [Sema Code: Decoupling AI Coding Agents into Programmable, Embeddable Infrastructure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11045)
*Huacan Wang,Jie Zhou,Ningyan Zhu,Shuo Zhang,Feiyu Chen,Jiarou Wu,Ge Chen,Chen Liu,Wangyi Chen,Xiaofeng Mou,Yi Xu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Sema Code是一个开源AI编码框架，采用可嵌入、可插拔、框架优先的设计原则，将核心代理引擎与客户端层完全解耦，使其成为可在任何运行时中编程驱动的独立npm库。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI编码代理解决方案将其推理能力锁定在特定交付形式（如CLI、IDE插件或Web应用）中，当企业尝试在异构工程环境中重用这些能力时，会形成系统性障碍。

Method: 设计了一个包含八个关键机制的架构：多租户引擎隔离、带安全会话重建的FIFO输入队列、自适应上下文压缩、多代理协作调度、基于Todo的智能流程管理、四层异步权限控制、三层生态系统集成（MCP、Skills、Plugins），以及具有分离执行和观察权限的后台任务框架。

Result: 相同的Sema Core引擎同时支持VSCode扩展和多通道消息网关（SemaClaw），统一了跨平台（如Telegram和Feishu）的代理交互，展示了架构的多样性。

Conclusion: Sema Code通过将复杂代理引擎转化为可共享、可编程的核心，解决了在异构工程环境中重用AI编码能力的挑战，实现了核心推理内核与客户端层的完全分离。

Abstract: AI coding agents have become central to developer workflows, yet every existing solution locks its reasoning capabilities within a specific delivery form, such as a CLI, IDE plugin, or web application. This limitation creates systemic barriers when enterprises attempt to reuse these capabilities across heterogeneous engineering environments. To address this challenge, we present Sema Code, an open AI coding framework built on the principle of being embeddable, pluggable, and framework-first. Sema Code completely decouples the core agent engine from all client layers, publishing it as a standalone npm library that any runtime can drive programmatically. Built around this architecture, we designed eight key mechanisms: multi-tenant engine isolation, FIFO input queuing with safe session reconstruction, adaptive context compression, multi-agent collaborative scheduling, intelligent Todo-based process management, four-layer asynchronous permission control, three-tier ecosystem integration spanning MCP, Skills, and Plugins, and a background task framework with separated execution and observation privileges. These mechanisms collectively address the engineering challenges of transforming a complex agent engine into a shared, programmable core. Demonstrating its architectural versatility, the same Sema Core engine simultaneously powers a VSCode extension and a multi-channel messaging gateway, which we name SemaClaw, to unify agent interactions across platforms such as Telegram and Feishu. These represent two fundamentally different product forms sharing an identical reasoning kernel, differing only at the client layer.

</details>


### [803] [E2E-REME: Towards End-to-End Microservices Auto-Remediation via Experience-Simulation Reinforcement Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11094)
*Lingzhe Zhang,Yunpeng Zhai,Tong Jia,Minghua He,Chiming Duan,Zhaoyang Liu,Bolin Ding,Ying Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出E2E-MR任务和E2E-REME模型，通过经验模拟强化微调实现端到端微服务自动修复，在公开和工业平台测试中优于9个LLM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前微服务系统规模扩大、复杂度增加导致故障频繁且代价高昂。现有LLM修复方法依赖专家提示和文本指令转换，缺乏运行时知识指导，使用大规模通用LLM限制了准确性和效率。

Method: 提出端到端微服务修复任务(E2E-MR)，直接从诊断报告生成可执行playbook。构建MicroRemed基准测试自动化部署、故障注入、执行和验证。开发E2E-REME模型，通过经验模拟强化微调训练。

Result: 在公开和工业微服务平台实验中，与9个代表性LLM相比，E2E-REME实现了更优的准确性和效率。

Conclusion: E2E-REME通过端到端自动修复方法，有效解决了现有LLM修复方法的局限性，在微服务故障修复任务中表现出色。

Abstract: Contemporary microservice systems continue to grow in scale and complexity, leading to increasingly frequent and costly failures. While recent LLM-based auto-remediation approaches have emerged, they primarily translate textual instructions into executable Ansible playbooks and rely on expert-crafted prompts, lacking runtime knowledge guidance and depending on large-scale general-purpose LLMs, which limits their accuracy and efficiency. We introduce \textit{End-to-End Microservice Remediation} (E2E-MR), a new task that requires directly generating executable playbooks from diagnosis reports to autonomously restore faulty systems. To enable rigorous evaluation, we build \textit{MicroRemed}, a benchmark that automates microservice deployment, failure injection, playbook execution, and post-repair verification. We further propose \textit{E2E-REME}, an end-to-end auto-remediation model trained via experience-simulation reinforcement fine-tuning. Experiments on public and industrial microservice platforms, compared with nine representative LLMs, show that E2E-REME achieves superior accuracy and efficiency.

</details>


### [804] [AnomalyGen: Enhancing Log-Based Anomaly Detection with Code-Guided Data Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11107)
*Xinyu Li,Yintong Huo,Chenxi Mao,Shiwen Shan,Yuxin Su,Yanlin Wang,Zibin Zheng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AnomalyGen：通过结合静态分析和LLM推理，从源代码合成带标签的日志序列，解决日志异常检测中训练数据稀疏问题，显著提升模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有日志异常检测面临训练数据稀疏问题，公开基准数据集仅覆盖不到10%的源代码日志模板，导致模型经常将未见但有效的执行路径误判为异常，产生误报。

Method: 提出AnomalyGen框架，分三阶段：1) 构建日志导向控制流图(LCFG)枚举结构有效的执行路径；2) 应用LLM链式思维推理验证逻辑一致性并生成真实运行时参数；3) 使用领域启发式方法为生成的序列打标签。

Result: 在HDFS和Zookeeper数据集上评估12个异常检测模型，AnomalyGen持续提升性能。深度学习模型平均F1分数提升2.18%(HDFS)和1.69%(Zookeeper)，其中无监督Transformer在HDFS上从0.818提升至0.970。消融实验表明静态分析和LLM验证都必要，移除它们分别使F1降低8.7和10.7个百分点。

Conclusion: AnomalyGen通过合成带标签的日志序列有效解决训练数据稀疏问题，显著提升异常检测性能，框架和数据集已公开以促进未来研究。

Abstract: Log-based anomaly detection is fundamentally constrained by training data sparsity. Our empirical study reveals that public benchmark datasets cover less than 10% of source code log templates. Consequently, models frequently misclassify unseen but valid execution paths as anomalies, leading to false alarms. To address this, we propose AnomalyGen, a novel framework that augments training data by synthesizing labeled log sequences from source code. AnomalyGen combines log-oriented static analysis with Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning in three stages: (1) building Log-Oriented Control Flow Graphs (LCFGs) to enumerate structurally valid execution paths; (2) applying LLM Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning to verify logical consistency and generate realistic runtime parameters (e.g., block IDs, IP addresses); and (3) labeling generated sequences with domain heuristics. Evaluations on HDFS and Zookeeper across 12 diverse anomaly detection models show AnomalyGen consistently improves performance. Deep learning models achieved average F1-score gains of 2.18% (HDFS) and 1.69% (Zookeeper), with an unsupervised Transformer on HDFS jumping from 0.818 to 0.970. Ablation results show that both static analysis and LLM-based verification are necessary: removing them reduces F1 by up to 8.7 and 10.7 percentage points, respectively. Our framework and datasets are publicly available to facilitate future research.

</details>


### [805] [Taking a Pulse on How Generative AI is Reshaping the Software Engineering Research Landscape](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11184)
*Bianca Trinkenreich,Fabio Calefato,Kelly Blincoe,Viggo Tellefsen Wivestad,Antonio Pedro Santos Alves,Júlia Condé Araújo,Marina Condé Araújo,Paolo Tell,Marcos Kalinowski,Thomas Zimmermann,Margaret-Anne Storey*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 对457名顶级软件工程研究人员的调查显示，GenAI在研究中的使用已广泛普及，主要用于写作和早期研究活动，但存在信任、准确性和监管不确定性等担忧。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管软件工程研究人员越来越多地研究生成式AI并将其纳入研究实践，但缺乏关于GenAI在SE研究中的实际使用情况及其对研究实践和治理影响的实证证据。

Method: 对2023-2025年间在顶级会议上发表论文的457名SE研究人员进行大规模调查，采用定量和定性分析方法，考察GenAI的使用者、原因、应用领域以及研究人员对其效益、机会、挑战、风险和治理的看法。

Result: GenAI使用广泛，研究人员感受到采用压力；主要集中于写作和早期研究活动，而方法和分析任务仍主要由人类驱动；普遍认为能提高生产力，但存在信任、准确性和监管不确定性等担忧；研究人员强调不准确性和偏见等风险，主张通过人工监督和验证来缓解，并呼吁建立更清晰的治理机制。

Conclusion: 提供了SE研究中GenAI使用的细粒度特征描述，包括研究用例分类、同行评审、机会、风险、缓解策略和治理需求，为负责任地将GenAI整合到学术实践中建立了实证基准。

Abstract: Context: Software engineering (SE) researchers increasingly study Generative AI (GenAI) while also incorporating it into their own research practices. Despite rapid adoption, there is limited empirical evidence on how GenAI is used in SE research and its implications for research practices and governance. Aims: We conduct a large-scale survey of 457 SE researchers publishing in top venues between 2023 and 2025. Method: Using quantitative and qualitative analyses, we examine who uses GenAI and why, where it is used across research activities, and how researchers perceive its benefits, opportunities, challenges, risks, and governance. Results: GenAI use is widespread, with many researchers reporting pressure to adopt and align their work with it. Usage is concentrated in writing and early-stage activities, while methodological and analytical tasks remain largely human-driven. Although productivity gains are widely perceived, concerns about trust, correctness, and regulatory uncertainty persist. Researchers highlight risks such as inaccuracies and bias, emphasize mitigation through human oversight and verification, and call for clearer governance, including guidance on responsible use and peer review. Conclusion: We provide a fine-grained, SE-specific characterization of GenAI use across research activities, along with taxonomies of GenAI use cases for research and peer review, opportunities, risks, mitigation strategies, and governance needs. These findings establish an empirical baseline for the responsible integration of GenAI into academic practice.

</details>


### [806] [Designing Adaptive Digital Nudging Systems with LLM-Driven Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11206)
*Tiziano Santilli,Mina Alipour,Mahyar Tourchi Moghaddam*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了一种将行为科学理论转化为软件架构的数字助推系统设计框架，通过显式的架构决策将伦理和公平作为结构性护栏，而非实现细节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数字助推系统缺乏将行为科学转化为软件设计的架构指导，现有架构未能将多维用户建模与伦理合规作为架构关注点进行整合。

Method: 通过文献综述综合68种助推策略、11个质量属性和3个用户画像维度形成架构需求，设计具有顺序处理层和交叉评估模块的架构，使用LLM驱动的住宅能源可持续性概念验证进行可行性评估。

Result: 13位软件架构师验证确认了需求满足和领域可转移性，15名用户的评估显示高感知干预质量和可测量的积极情感影响。

Conclusion: 该工作通过提供可重用模式，在行为科学与软件架构之间搭建桥梁，创建了平衡有效性与伦理约束的自适应系统。

Abstract: Digital nudging systems lack architectural guidance for translating behavioral science into software design. While research identifies nudge strategies and quality attributes, existing architectures fail to integrate multi-dimensional user modeling with ethical compliance as architectural concerns. We present an architecture that uses behavioral theory through explicit architectural decisions, treating ethics and fairness as structural guardrails rather than implementation details. A literature review synthesized 68 nudging strategies, 11 quality attributes, and 3 user profiling dimensions into architectural requirements. The architecture implements sequential processing layers with cross-cutting evaluation modules enforcing regulatory compliance. Validation with 13 software architects confirmed requirements satisfaction and domain transferability. An LLM-powered proof-of-concept in residential energy sustainability demonstrated feasibility through evaluation with 15 users, achieving high perceived intervention quality and measurable positive emotional impact. This work bridges behavioral science and software architecture by providing reusable patterns for adaptive systems that balance effectiveness with ethical constraints.

</details>


### [807] [Evaluating LLM Agents on Automated Software Analysis Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11270)
*Michael Pradel,Cristian Cadar,Islem Bouzenia*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出AnalysisBench基准测试，评估LLM智能体在自动化软件分析任务上的表现，发现自定义的AnalysisAgent在35个任务中达到94%成功率，优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有软件分析工具难以应用于多样化的开源项目，因为涉及环境搭建、依赖解析和工具配置等复杂问题。虽然LLM智能体提供了潜在解决方案，但缺乏针对自动化软件分析这一特定任务的系统性研究。

Method: 构建AnalysisBench基准测试，包含35个工具-项目对，涵盖7种分析工具和10个C/C++/Java项目。评估四种智能体架构和四个LLM后端，并提出自定义的AnalysisAgent。

Result: AnalysisAgent在Gemini-3-Flash上达到94%成功率（33/35任务），最佳基线方法ExecutionAgent为77%。研究发现智能体架构比LLM能力更重要，全程序分析和符号执行最困难，Java工具链比C/C++更具挑战性。

Conclusion: LLM智能体在自动化软件分析任务上表现出色，但现有智能体存在阶段混合、错误定位差和过早终止等问题。智能体架构设计对成功至关重要，且LLM自我验证的成功率通常被高估。

Abstract: Numerous software analysis tools exist today, yet applying them to diverse open-source projects remains challenging due to environment setup, dependency resolution, and tool configuration. LLM-based agents offer a potential solution, yet no prior work has systematically studied their effectiveness on the specific task of automated software analysis, which, unlike issue solving or general environment setup, requires installing and configuring a separate analysis tool alongside the target project, generating tool-specific prerequisites, and validating that the tool produces meaningful analysis outputs. We introduce AnalysisBench, a benchmark of 35 tool-project pairs spanning seven analysis tools and ten diverse C/C++ and Java projects, each with a manually constructed reference setup. Using AnalysisBench, we evaluate four agent architectures across four LLM backends. Our custom agent, AnalysisAgent, achieves manually verified success rates of 94% (Gemini-3-Flash, 33/35 tasks), compared to 77% for the best baseline (ExecutionAgent). Beyond quantitative results, we identify key limitations in existing agents, including stage mixing, poor error localization, and premature termination, and show that agentic architecture matters more than LLM capability alone. We further find that whole-program analyses and symbolic execution are the most difficult tasks, that Java toolchains pose greater challenges than C/C++, and that LLM-self-validated success consistently overstates manually verified success.

</details>


### [808] [Using Budgets to Reduce Application Emissions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11341)
*Leo Wilhelm Lierse,Mahyar Tourchi Moghaddam,Sebastian Werner*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出使用排放预算代替固定排放率，通过动态调整应用资源分配，在满足长期排放限制的同时最大化性能表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着碳定价机制（如欧盟排放交易体系）提高能源消耗成本，软件架构师面临设计在可预测排放约束下运行应用的压力。现有固定排放率方法不适合碳强度高度动态变化的电网环境，特别是在可再生能源占比增加的电网中。

Method: 提出排放预算方法，取代固定排放率，允许应用在低碳强度期间节省未使用的排放额度，在高碳强度期间使用。采用MAPE-K反馈循环监控应用功耗和电网碳强度，通过垂直扩展或迁移动态调整资源分配。

Result: 使用德国、法国和波兰六周真实碳强度数据进行模拟，结果显示预算管理在可变电网中相比固定率方法提升任务完成率高达36%。在稳定电网中，预算方法与固定率表现相当，可作为安全替代方案。

Conclusion: 排放预算是平衡环境约束、运营成本和服务质量的实用机制，特别是在排放直接转化为财务惩罚的情况下，能够帮助应用在动态碳强度环境中优化性能同时满足排放限制。

Abstract: As carbon pricing mechanisms like the EU Emissions Trading System are set to increase prices of energy consumption, software architects face growing pressure to design applications that operate within financially predictable emission constraints. Existing approaches typically enforce rigid per-interval emission rates, which prove unsuitable in electrical grids with highly dynamic carbon intensity, which is common in grids with growing renewable energy adoption. We propose the use of emissions budgets, an approach that replaces fixed emission rates with time-bound budgets, enabling applications to dynamically save unused emission allowances during low carbon intensity periods and expend them during high carbon intensity periods. We describe emissions-aware applications using a MAPE-K feedback loop that continuously monitors application power consumption and grid carbon intensity, then adapts resource allocation through vertical scaling or migration to maintain long-term emission limits while maximizing performance. Through simulation using six weeks of real-world carbon intensity data from Germany, France, and Poland, we demonstrate that budget-based management improves task fulfillment by up to 36% in variable grids compared to fixed rates. Crucially, budgets achieve parity with fixed rates in stable grids, making them a safe replacement. We show that emissions budgets are a practical mechanism to balance environmental constraints, operational costs, and service quality when emissions directly translate to financial penalties.

</details>


### [809] [Nix: A Solution With Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11398)
*Matias Zwinger*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文对Nix包管理系统的研究现状进行文献综述，分析其解决传统软件部署问题的方法，同时探讨Nix自身引入的新问题及未解决的旧问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件部署面临可重复性、依赖解析等诸多问题，Nix项目采用纯函数式方法解决了许多问题，但并未解决所有问题且引入了新问题，因此需要系统分析Nix的研究现状和未来方向。

Method: 论文分为三部分：1) 分析软件部署历史问题（构建系统、包管理器、配置管理、开发环境）；2) 介绍Nix及其解决问题的方法；3) 分析Nix引入的新问题和未解决的旧问题，并讨论Nix社区提出的先进解决方案。

Result: Nix成功解决了传统软件部署中的许多问题，特别是通过纯函数式方法改善了可重复性和依赖管理，但同时也引入了新问题，并且某些旧问题（如信任、细粒度增量构建）仍未解决。

Conclusion: Nix作为首个大规模采用纯函数式方法的项目，虽然显著改善了软件部署，但并非完美解决方案，需要进一步研究解决其引入的新问题和遗留问题，为未来研究指明方向。

Abstract: Software deployment suffers from numerous problems pertaining, for example, to reproducibility and dependency resolution. Many of these problems have been successfully solved by the purely functional approach to package management implemented in the Nix project. However, Nix does not solve all issues, and it does introduces some novel problems of its own. Therefore, the aim of this thesis is to conduct a literature review on the current state of research on Nix and to determine the direction of future research.
  The first part of this paper explores the problems historically faced in different areas of software deployment, e.g., irreproducibility and dependency resolution issues. The main four categories of software deployment tools analyzed are build systems, package managers, configuration management, and development environments. Popular software from each category serve as case studies to illustrate the problems. The second part introduces Nix and explains the methods utilized to solve some of the problems introduced in the earlier part.
  Because Nix is the first large project to utilize the purely functional approach, it is far from a perfect solution. Thus, the third part is dedicated to analyzing the new problems that Nix introduces, as well as old problems, which Nix has been unable to solve, such as trust and granular incremental builds. Furthermore, some proposed state of the art solutions put forth by the Nix community are discussed.

</details>


### [810] [DuET: Dual Execution for Test Output Prediction with Generated Code and Pseudocode](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11514)
*Hojae Han,Jaejin Kim,Seung-won Hwang,Yu Jin Kim,Moontae Lee*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出DuET双执行框架，结合代码直接执行和LLM伪代码执行，通过功能多数投票提高测试输出预测的可靠性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通过生成代码来提升LLM预测测试输出的可靠性，但直接执行代码时即使微小错误也会导致失败，需要更鲁棒的方法

Method: 引入LLM伪代码执行，基于错误容忍度更高的伪代码进行预测；提出DuET双执行框架，结合直接代码执行和伪代码执行，通过功能多数投票整合两种方法

Result: 在LiveCodeBench上达到最先进性能，Pass@1提升13.6个百分点；分析显示两种方法互补，直接执行受代码错误影响，伪代码推理受幻觉影响

Conclusion: DuET框架通过结合直接执行和伪代码执行的优势，有效提高了测试输出预测的可靠性，为测试用例生成提供了更鲁棒的解决方案

Abstract: This work addresses test output prediction, a key challenge in test case generation. To improve the reliability of predicted outputs by LLMs, prior approaches generate code first to ground predictions. One grounding strategy is direct execution of generated code, but even minor errors can cause failures. To address this, we introduce LLM-based pseudocode execution, which grounds prediction on more error-resilient pseudocode and simulates execution via LLM reasoning. We further propose DuET, a dual-execution framework that combines both approaches by functional majority voting. Our analysis shows the two approaches are complementary in overcoming the limitations of direct execution suffering from code errors, and pseudocode reasoning from hallucination. On LiveCodeBench, DuET achieves the state-of-the-art performance, improving Pass@1 by 13.6 pp.

</details>


### [811] [From Translation to Superset: Benchmark-Driven Evolution of a Production AI Agent from Rust to Python](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11518)
*Jinhua Wang,Biswa Sengupta*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LLM辅助的持续代码翻译方法，将648K行Rust代码库翻译成Python，通过基准测试驱动迭代优化，实现功能对等并扩展新功能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决大型软件系统跨语言迁移的工程挑战，特别是在源代码库快速演进的情况下。针对生产Rust代码库向Python的迁移需求，以AI编码代理系统为研究对象。

Method: 提出LLM辅助的持续代码翻译方法，使用大型语言模型翻译Rust代码到Python，以公开代理基准测试作为目标函数驱动迭代优化。采用基准测试驱动的调试方法，支持通过LLM辅助的差异翻译测试循环进行持续上游同步。

Result: Python移植版在SWE-bench验证任务中达到73.8%成功率（Rust为70.0%），在Terminal-Bench中达到42.5%（Rust为47.5%）。Python版本实现了15.9倍的代码精简，并扩展了30个功能标记扩展（多代理编排、语义记忆、安全防护、成本跟踪等）。

Conclusion: 对于LLM代理系统，Python的表达能力在API延迟主导的场景下具有优势，基准测试作为目标函数的方法为跨语言移植提供了从功能对等到平台扩展的原则性框架。

Abstract: Cross-language migration of large software systems is a persistent engineering challenge, particularly when the source codebase evolves rapidly. We present a methodology for LLM-assisted continuous code translation in which a large language model translates a production Rust codebase (648K LOC, 65 crates) into Python (41K LOC, 28 modules), with public agent benchmarks as the objective function driving iterative refinement. Our subject system is Codex CLI, a production AI coding agent. We demonstrate that: (1) the Python port resolves 59/80 SWE-bench Verified tasks (73.8%) versus Rust's 56/80 (70.0%), and achieves 42.5% on Terminal-Bench versus Rust's 47.5%, confirming near-parity on real-world agentic tasks; (2) benchmark-driven debugging, revealing API protocol mismatches, environment pollution, a silent WebSocket failure mode, and an API 400 crash, is more effective than static testing alone; (3) the architecture supports continuous upstream synchronisation via an LLM-assisted diff-translate-test loop; and (4) the Python port has evolved into a capability superset with 30 feature-flagged extensions (multi-agent orchestration, semantic memory, guardian safety, cost tracking) absent from Rust, while preserving strict parity mode for comparison. Our evaluation shows that for LLM-based agents where API latency dominates, Python's expressiveness yields a 15.9x code reduction with negligible performance cost, while the benchmark-as-objective-function methodology provides a principled framework for growing a cross-language port from parity into an extended platform.

</details>


### [812] [Beyond the Golden Record: Toward a Design Theory for Trustworthy Master Data Management with Self-Sovereign Identity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11537)
*Niklas Schulte,Isaac Henderson Johnson Jeyakumar,Michael Kubach,Christian Janiesch*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 基于自主权身份构建可信主数据管理的设计理论，通过数据空间参考架构实现，确保主数据的可靠性、主权性和可问责性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 组织依赖商业数据经纪人解决主数据质量问题，但这会形成战略依赖并带来业务风险，因为供应商通常不对数据准确性负责。现代数据生态系统支持具有强数据主权的可信数据共享，需要新的解决方案。

Method: 通过解释性文献综述结合行业专家访谈，推导基于自主权身份的可信主数据管理设计理论，并将其实例化到数据空间参考架构中，最后通过额外行业专家访谈进行评估。

Result: 提出了一个可信主数据管理的框架，该框架在数据生态系统中具有可靠性、主权性和可问责性，为组织提供了替代传统商业数据经纪人依赖的解决方案。

Conclusion: 基于自主权身份的设计理论为可信主数据管理提供了可行方案，能够解决传统方法中的依赖和风险问题，支持数据生态系统中的可靠、主权和可问责的数据管理。

Abstract: Ensuring the timeliness and reliability of master data remains a persistent challenge for many organizations. To mitigate these quality deficits, organizations frequently rely on commercial data brokers. However, this practice creates strategic dependencies and poses significant business risks, particularly as providers typically disclaim liability for the accuracy of the supplied data. In contrast, modern data ecosystems enable the trusted sharing of data assets with strong data sovereignty. In this paper, we address this paradigm shift by deriving a nascent design theory for trustworthy master data management based on self-sovereign identity. The theory is grounded through a hermeneutic literature review combined with industry expert interviews and instantiated through integration into a reference architecture for data spaces. Following an evaluation through additional industry expert interviews, our work provides a framework for a trustworthy master data management in data ecosystems that is reliable, sovereign, and accountable.

</details>


### [813] [FM-Agent: Scaling Formal Methods to Large Systems via LLM-Based Hoare-Style Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11556)
*Haoran Ding,Zhaoguo Wang,Haibo Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: FM-Agent：首个实现大规模系统自动化组合推理的框架，利用LLM自动生成函数级规范，支持自然语言规范推理，在已测试的大型系统中发现522个新bug。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM辅助软件开发生成大规模系统（如编译器）时，确保代码正确性至关重要。现有自动化推理方法难以处理大规模系统，Hoare逻辑需要为每个函数编写形式化规范，人工负担重。当代码由LLM生成时，开发者缺乏对每个函数预期行为的深入理解，问题更加严重。

Method: FM-Agent采用自上而下的范式，利用LLM自动生成函数级规范：从调用者对函数的期望行为推导函数规范，即使实现有bug也能反映开发者意图。扩展Hoare风格推理以支持自然语言规范推理。自动生成测试用例触发潜在bug并解释原因。

Result: FM-Agent在2天内成功推理了最多14.3万行代码的大规模系统。这些系统已经过开发者测试，但FM-Agent仍发现了522个新bug，这些bug可能导致系统崩溃和执行结果错误等严重后果。

Conclusion: FM-Agent是首个实现大规模系统自动化组合推理的框架，通过LLM自动生成函数规范、支持自然语言推理，显著提升了大规模系统验证的可扩展性和实用性，在已测试系统中仍能发现严重bug。

Abstract: LLM-assisted software development has become increasingly prevalent, and can generate large-scale systems, such as compilers. It becomes crucial to strengthen the correctness of the generated code. However, automated reasoning for large-scale systems remains challenging due to code complexity. Hoare logic offers an approach to decomposing a large system into smaller components and reasoning about them separately (i.e., compositional reasoning). However, existing works still struggle to scale, because Hoare logic requires writing formal specifications for each function, imposing a heavy human burden. The problem is exacerbated when code is generated by LLMs, as developers lack a deep understanding of each function's expected behavior.
  This paper presents FM-Agent, the first framework that realizes automated compositional reasoning for large-scale systems. Leveraging LLMs, FM-Agent introduces a top-down paradigm to automatically generate function-level specifications. Specifically, FM-Agent derives the specification of a function from how its callers expect the function to behave, so the generated specifications can reflect the developer's intent of a function even if the implementation is buggy. Developers' intent is usually expressed in natural language, while existing verifiers only support formulas. Therefore, FM-Agent generalizes Hoare-style inference to reason about functions against natural-language specifications. Finally, to confirm bug existence and explain bug causes, FM-Agent automatically generates test cases to trigger potential bugs. In our evaluation, FM-Agent successfully reasons about large-scale systems within 2 days, each of which has up to 143k LoC. These systems have already been tested by their developers, but FM-Agent still finds 522 newly discovered bugs. These bugs can cause serious consequences, including system crashes and incorrect execution results.

</details>


### [814] [The Unified Field Theory of Phygital Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11619)
*Silvio Meira*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个统一的物理数字空间场论，将现实视为物理、数字和社会维度的统一流形，而非线上/线下二分，并建立了包含几何、热力学和时间理论的数学框架，用中国电商生态系统进行实证验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前对现实的理解往往将"线上"和"线下"视为二分对立，缺乏统一的框架来描述物理、数字和社会维度如何耦合形成当代现实。需要理论框架来理解平台如何塑造现代生活、经济价值如何产生，以及时间体验的病理现象。

Method: 1. 将物理数字空间形式化为拓扑站点上的层结构，包含物理(U)、网络数字(D)和网络社会(S)三个维度；2. 引入信息性作为计算、通信和控制的三元能力；3. 使用Finsler几何建模跨维度交互的不对称成本；4. 定义本体质量张量编码跨耦合维度的变化阻力；5. 引入自创生动力学描述人、算法和社会形态的内生能动性；6. 建立非平衡热力学模型，将经济价值视为平台作为耗散结构产生的负熵；7. 通过李导数形式化时间剪切理论；8. 用中国电商生态系统(1999-2025)进行纵向实证分析。

Result: 建立了统一的物理数字空间场论框架，能够：1. 描述物理、数字和社会维度的耦合关系；2. 解释平台作为现实组织者的作用；3. 量化跨维度交互的不对称成本；4. 建模本体质量对变化的阻力；5. 解释经济价值作为负熵的产生机制；6. 形式化现代时间病理现象；7. 成功应用于中国电商生态系统演化分析；8. 扩展到合成智能体的后人类生态学。

Conclusion: 当代现实是物理、数字和社会维度统一的本体流形，而非简单的二分法。平台作为耗散结构通过组织信息流产生经济价值。该统一场论为理解平台治理、人类繁荣和后人类生态学提供了理论基础，并通过中国电商案例验证了其解释力。

Abstract: This paper proposes a Unified Field Theory of Phygital Space, positing that contemporary reality is not a dichotomy of "online" and "offline," but a unified ontological manifold of irreducible but coupled dimensions. We formalize Phygital Space as a sheaf over a topological site composed of the Physical (U), Networked Digital (D), and Networked Social (S) dimensions, grounded in Informaticity -- the triune capacity to compute, communicate, and control -- and instantiated through Platforms. We develop a rigorous framework incorporating Finsler geometry to model the inherently asymmetric costs of cross-dimensional interaction. We define Ontological Mass (mu) as a tensor quantity encoding resistance to change across coupled dimensions, and introduce autopoietic dynamics to account for the endogenous agency of persons, algorithms, and social formations. We propose a non-equilibrium thermodynamic model where economic value is negentropy generated by platforms acting as dissipative structures. We introduce a theory of Temporal Shear formalized through Lie derivatives to explain the pathologies of modern time. The theory is empirically validated through a longitudinal analysis of the Chinese e-commerce ecosystem (1999-2025), modeling the dimensional trajectories of Taobao, JD.com, Pinduoduo, and Douyin across twenty-five years of evolution. We extend the framework to a post-human ecology of Synthetic Agents and articulate the normative implications for platform governance and human flourishing.

</details>


### [815] [CodeTracer: Towards Traceable Agent States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11641)
*Han Li,Yifan Yao,Letian Zhu,Rili Feng,Hongyi Ye,Jiaming Wang,Yancheng He,Pengyu Zou,Lehan Zhang,Xinping Lei,Haoyang Huang,Ken Deng,Ming Sun,Zhaoxiang Zhang,He Ye,Jiaheng Liu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: CodeTracer是一个用于调试代码代理的追踪架构，通过解析异构运行工件、重建状态转换历史为层次化追踪树，并进行故障起始定位来识别错误链。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着代码代理框架协调并行工具调用和多阶段工作流，代理的状态转换和错误传播变得难以观察，早期错误可能导致代理陷入无效率循环或级联错误，形成隐藏的错误链，现有追踪分析方法要么过于简单，要么依赖小规模人工检查，限制了其可扩展性和实用性。

Method: CodeTracer通过演化提取器解析异构运行工件，将完整状态转换历史重建为具有持久内存的层次化追踪树，并执行故障起始定位来精确定位故障起源及其下游链。为了系统评估，作者从四个广泛使用的代码代理框架在多样化代码任务上执行的大量轨迹中构建了CodeTraceBench，并在阶段和步骤级别提供故障定位监督。

Result: 实验表明，CodeTracer显著优于直接提示和轻量级基线方法，并且重放其诊断信号能够在匹配预算下持续恢复原本失败的运行。

Conclusion: CodeTracer提供了一个有效的追踪架构来调试复杂的代码代理，通过系统化的故障定位和诊断，提高了代码代理工作流的可观察性和可调试性。

Abstract: Code agents are advancing rapidly, but debugging them is becoming increasingly difficult. As frameworks orchestrate parallel tool calls and multi-stage workflows over complex tasks, making the agent's state transitions and error propagation hard to observe. In these runs, an early misstep can trap the agent in unproductive loops or even cascade into fundamental errors, forming hidden error chains that make it hard to tell when the agent goes off track and why. Existing agent tracing analyses either focus on simple interaction or rely on small-scale manual inspection, which limits their scalability and usefulness for real coding workflows. We present CodeTracer, a tracing architecture that parses heterogeneous run artifacts through evolving extractors, reconstructs the full state transition history as a hierarchical trace tree with persistent memory, and performs failure onset localization to pinpoint the failure origin and its downstream chain. To enable systematic evaluation, we construct CodeTraceBench from a large collection of executed trajectories generated by four widely used code agent frameworks on diverse code tasks (e.g., bug fixing, refactoring, and terminal interaction), with supervision at both the stage and step levels for failure localization. Experiments show that CodeTracer substantially outperforms direct prompting and lightweight baselines, and that replaying its diagnostic signals consistently recovers originally failed runs under matched budgets. Our code and data are publicly available.

</details>


### [816] [AutonomyLens: A Self-Evolving Simulation-Based Testing Loop for Autonomous Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11672)
*Ankit Agrawal,Jithin Garapati,Bohan Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AutonomyLens是一个LLM驱动的框架，将自主网络物理系统的场景设计、仿真执行和遥测分析集成到统一验证工作流中，提高可追溯性、可重复性和可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前自主网络物理系统（如无人机）的软件工程验证实践在场景设计、仿真执行和遥测分析方面存在碎片化，限制了需求、测试和证据之间的可追溯性。这种碎片化降低了可重复性，减缓了调试和迭代速度，阻碍了在复杂和不断变化的环境条件下进行系统性保证。

Method: AutonomyLens框架包含：(1) 任务级场景的结构化表示；(2) 自动化执行流水线；(3) 将遥测数据与场景上下文对齐以产生可行见解的分析机制；(4) 反事实场景生成，通过从观察到的故障中细化和合成新测试用例来形成闭环。

Result: 论文描述了AutonomyLens的早期设计阶段，讨论了构建自主系统集成验证工作流的关键挑战，并概述了这种方法如何提高自主性验证中的可追溯性、可重复性和可扩展性。

Conclusion: AutonomyLens通过LLM驱动的集成验证工作流，解决了自主系统验证中的碎片化问题，有望改善验证过程的系统性、效率和可靠性。

Abstract: Software engineering practices for validating autonomous cyber-physical systems (e.g., Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles) remain fragmented across scenario design, simulation execution, and telemetry analysis, limiting traceability between requirements, tests, and evidence. This fragmentation reduces reproducibility, slows debugging and iteration, and hinders systematic assurance under complex and evolving environmental conditions.
  We present AutonomyLens, an LLM-driven framework that integrates scenario specification, simulation execution, and telemetry analysis into a unified validation workflow. AutonomyLens enables developers to translate high-level validation intent into executable, temporally evolving scenarios, automatically run simulations, and perform context-aware analysis of resulting system behavior. The framework introduces (i) a structured representation for mission-level scenarios, (ii) an automated execution pipeline, (iii) analysis mechanisms that align telemetry with scenario context to produce actionable insights, and (iv) counterfactual scenario generation that closes the loop by refining and synthesizing new test cases from observed failures. We describe the early-stage design of AutonomyLens, discuss key challenges in building integrated validation workflows for autonomous systems, and outline how such an approach can improve traceability, reproducibility, and scalability in autonomy validation.

</details>


### [817] [Enhancing Program Repair with Specification Guidance and Intermediate Behavioral Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11770)
*Minh Le-Anh,Cuong Chi Le,Tien N. Nguyen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SpecTune：一个基于规范指导的调试框架，通过中间行为推理将程序修复分解为可疑区域，利用LLM生成后条件并验证，提高故障定位和补丁生成精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的APR方法主要依赖测试套件结果的粗粒度端到端信号，缺乏对程序内部逻辑与预期行为偏差的深入洞察。人类调试通常通过局部正确性条件或断言进行中间状态推理，需要将这种中间行为推理融入APR

Method: 1. 将修复任务分解为通过执行检查点连接的可疑区域；2. 推导表示这些点预期行为的局部后条件；3. 执行错误程序并评估后条件，产生微观调试信号；4. 引入两个互补信号：规范验证信号α（使用部分通过测试用例估计生成后条件的一致性）和判别信号β（检测执行中已验证后条件的违反）

Result: 实验结果显示，SpecTune在故障定位和APR有效性方面优于基线方法

Conclusion: 通过将中间行为推理融入APR，SpecTune能够安全利用自动生成的规范进行程序修复，提高调试精度和修复效果

Abstract: Automated Program Repair (APR) has recently benefited from large language models (LLMs). However, most LLM-based APR approaches still rely primarily on coarse end-to-end signals from test-suite outcomes to guide repair, providing limited insight into where a program's internal logic deviates from its intended behavior. In contrast, human debugging often relies on intermediate reasoning about program states through localized correctness conditions or assertions. Inspired by this observation, we propose SpecTune, a specification-guided debugging framework that incorporates intermediate behavioral reasoning into APR. SpecTune decomposes the repair task into suspicious regions connected by execution checkpoints and derives localized postconditions representing expected program behaviors at those points. By executing the buggy program and evaluating these postconditions, SpecTune produces micro-level debugging signals that indicate mismatches between observed and intended behaviors, enabling more precise fault localization and targeted patch generation. To address the potential unreliability of LLM-generated postconditions, we introduce two complementary signals: a specification validation signal alpha, which estimates the consistency of generated postconditions using partially passing test cases, and a discriminative signal beta, which detects violations of validated postconditions during execution. With these signals, SpecTune safely leverages automatically generated specifications for APR. Experimental results show that SpecTune improves fault localization and APR effectiveness than the baselines.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [818] [Efficient Disruption of Criminal Networks through Multi-Objective Genetic Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09647)
*Yehezkiel Darmadi,Thanh Thi Nguyen,Campbell Wilson*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出多目标优化框架（WS-GA和NSGA-II）来识别犯罪网络破坏策略，在最大化网络碎片化和最小化执法机构操作成本（空间距离）之间取得平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于中心性的犯罪网络破坏方法效率低下，未能考虑执法机构在实际操作中的成本限制（如空间距离），需要更实用的策略优化框架。

Method: 使用加权和遗传算法（WS-GA）和非支配排序遗传算法II（NSGA-II）的多目标优化框架，以网络碎片化和操作成本（节点到执法机构总部的空间距离）为优化目标，在"Montagna Operation"数据集上进行实验。

Result: 基于中心性的方法虽然能有效碎片化网络，但操作成本较高；提出的算法能达到相当的破坏效果，同时显著降低操作成本。

Conclusion: 将空间距离约束纳入犯罪网络破坏策略，提供了可扩展的多目标优化能力，提高了社会网络分析在指导执法机构更高效、战略性地破坏犯罪网络方面的实际应用价值。

Abstract: Criminal networks, such as the Sicilian Mafia, pose substantial threats to public safety, national security, and economic stability. Outdated disruption methods with a focus on removing influential individuals or key players have proven ineffective due to the covertness of the network. Thus, researchers have been trying to apply Social Network Analysis (SNA) techniques, such as centrality-based measures, to identify key players. However, removing individuals with high centrality often proves to be inefficient, as it does not mimic the real-world scenarios that Law Enforcement Agencies (LEAs) face. For instance, the operational costs limit the LEAs from exploiting the results of the centrality-based methods. This study proposes a multi-objective optimisation framework like the Weighted Sum Genetic Algorithm (WS-GA) and the Non-dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm II (NSGA-II) to identify disruption strategies that balance two conflicting goals, maximising fragmentation and minimising operational cost which is captured by the spatial distance between nodes and the nearest LEA headquarters. The study utilises the "Montagna Operation" dataset for the experiments. The results demonstrate that although centrality-based approaches can fragment network effectively, they tend to incur higher operational costs. In contrast, the proposed algorithms achieve comparable disruption outcomes with significantly lower operational costs. The contribution of this work lies in incorporating operational costs in a form of spatial distance constraints into disruption strategy, which has been largely overlooked in prior studies. This research offers a scalable multi-objective capability that improves practical application of SNA in guiding LEAs in disrupting criminal networks more efficiently and strategically.

</details>


### [819] [Isomorphic Functionalities between Ant Colony and Ensemble Learning: Part III -- Gradient Descent, Neural Plasticity, and the Emergence of Deep Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09677)
*Ernest Fokoué,Gregory Babbitt,Yuval Levental*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 该论文证明蚁群决策与深度学习中的随机梯度下降在数学上同构，揭示了社会性昆虫集体智能与机器学习三大范式（并行集成、序列集成、梯度学习）的统一理论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 完成三部曲系列，建立蚁群决策与机器学习三大范式（随机森林、提升法、深度学习）的完整同构关系，揭示学习原理的普适性。

Method: 证明信息素演化与权重更新的数学同构性，将蒸发率对应学习率、群体适应度对应负损失、招募波对应反向传播，并模拟验证学习曲线。

Result: 蚁群在环境任务中的学习曲线与神经网络在类似问题上的学习曲线无法区分，确认了深度学习算法与蚁群世代学习动力学的数学同构。

Conclusion: 蚁群不仅是学习算法的类比，更是学习基本原理的活体体现，揭示了超越基质的统一学习理论。

Abstract: In Parts I and II of this series, we established isomorphisms between ant colony decision-making and two major families of ensemble learning: random forests (parallel, variance reduction) and boosting (sequential, bias reduction). Here we complete the trilogy by demonstrating that the fundamental learning algorithm underlying deep neural networks -- stochastic gradient descent -- is mathematically isomorphic to the generational learning dynamics of ant colonies. We prove that pheromone evolution across generations follows the same update equations as weight evolution during gradient descent, with evaporation rates corresponding to learning rates, colony fitness corresponding to negative loss, and recruitment waves corresponding to backpropagation passes. We further show that neural plasticity mechanisms -- long-term potentiation, long-term depression, synaptic pruning, and neurogenesis -- have direct analogs in colony-level adaptation: trail reinforcement, evaporation, abandonment, and new trail formation. Comprehensive simulations confirm that ant colonies trained on environmental tasks exhibit learning curves indistinguishable from neural networks trained on analogous problems. This final isomorphism reveals that all three major paradigms of machine learning -- parallel ensembles, sequential ensembles, and gradient-based deep learning -- have direct analogs in the collective intelligence of social insects, suggesting a unified theory of learning that transcends substrate. The ant colony, we conclude, is not merely analogous to learning algorithms; it is a living embodiment of the fundamental principles of learning itself.

</details>


### [820] [Sharpness-Aware Surrogate Training for On-Sensor Spiking Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09696)
*Maximilian Nicholson*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: SAST方法通过将锐度感知最小化应用于脉冲神经网络的代理梯度训练，显著减少了代理训练到硬阈值部署时的性能下降，在事件相机基准测试中大幅提升了硬脉冲精度并降低了计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脉冲神经网络是传感器视觉的自然计算模型，但使用代理梯度训练的模型在部署时从平滑代理非线性替换为硬阈值时性能会急剧下降，这种代理到硬件的转移差距直接限制了传感器上的精度。

Method: 提出了锐度感知代理训练（SAST），将锐度感知最小化（SAM）应用于代理前向的脉冲神经网络，使训练目标平滑且梯度精确，作为减少转移差距的策略之一。

Result: 在两个事件相机基准测试中，硬脉冲精度显著提升：N-MNIST从65.7%到94.7%，DVS Gesture从31.8%到63.3%。在硬件感知推理模拟下（INT8/INT4量化、定点膜电位、离散泄漏因子），性能保持强劲，同时SynOps计算开销显著降低。

Conclusion: SAST是传感器上脉冲推理工具箱中一个有前景的组件，能够有效减少代理到硬件的转移差距，在严格的功耗预算下提升事件驱动处理器的性能。

Abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are a natural computational model for on-sensor and near-sensor vision, where event driven processors must operate under strict power budgets with hard binary spikes. However, models trained with surrogate gradients often degrade sharply when the smooth surrogate nonlinearity is replaced by a hard threshold at deployment; a surrogate-to-hard transfer gap that directly limits on-sensor accuracy. We study Sharpness-Aware Surrogate Training (SAST), which applies Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM) to a surrogate-forward SNN so that the training objective is smooth and the gradient is exact, and position it as one gap-reduction strategy under the tested settings rather than the only viable mechanism. Under explicit contraction assumptions we provide state-stability, input-Lipschitz, and smoothness bounds, together with a corresponding nonconvex convergence result. On two event-camera benchmarks, swap-only hard-spike accuracy improves from 65.7\% to 94.7\% on N-MNIST and from 31.8\% to 63.3\% on DVS Gesture. Under a hardware-aware inference simulation (INT8/INT4 weight quantization, fixed-point membrane potentials, discrete leak factors), SAST remains strong: on N-MNIST, hard-spike accuracy improves from 47.6\% to 96.9\% (INT8) and from 43.2\% to 81.0\% (INT4), while on DVS Gesture it improves from 25.3\% to 47.6\% (INT8) and from 26.0\% to 43.8\% (INT4). SynOps also decrease under the same hardware-aware setting, including 1734k$\rightarrow$1315k (N-MNIST, INT8) and 86221k$\rightarrow$4323k (DVS Gesture, INT8). These results suggest that SAST is a promising component in a broader toolbox for on-sensor spiking inference under the tested settings.

</details>


### [821] [Beyond Silicon: Materials, Mechanisms, and Methods for Physical Neural Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09833)
*Stefan Fischer,Nihat Ay,Olaf Landsiedel,Esfandiar Mohammadi,Sebastian Otte,Bernd-Christian Renner,Nele Rußwinkel*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 物理神经计算利用各种物理介质（忆阻器、光子电路、机械超材料等）实现神经推理和适应，作为超越传统数字加速器的补充路径，特别适用于资源受限的边缘AI应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 硅基GPU为中心的AI面临日益增长的能量和数据移动限制，而物理神经计算通过利用物理介质的固有过程，能够减少数据移动并提高效率，特别适用于大规模部署的资源受限边缘AI系统。

Method: 将神经原语映射到特定基质的机制，分析架构和训练范式，识别关键工程约束（可扩展性、精度、可编程性、I/O接口开销），并引入基于标准化静态和动态任务的第一阶基准测试方案。

Result: 没有单一基质在所有维度上占主导地位，物理神经系统占据互补的操作机制，支持从超快信号处理、内存内推理到嵌入式控制和生化决策等多种应用。

Conclusion: 物理神经计算作为超越传统数字加速器的补充路径具有重要价值，通过统一框架和基准测试方案可以促进跨领域比较和系统设计，推动该领域从碎片化走向系统化发展。

Abstract: Physical implementations of neural computation now extend far beyond silicon hardware, encompassing substrates such as memristive devices, photonic circuits, mechanical metamaterials, microfluidic networks, chemical reaction systems, and living neural tissue. By exploiting intrinsic physical processes such as charge transport, wave interference, elastic deformation, mass transport, and biochemical regulation, these substrates can realize neural inference and adaptation directly in matter. As silicon GPU-centered AI faces growing energy and data-movement constraints, physical neural computation is becoming increasingly relevant as a complementary path beyond conventional digital accelerators. This trend is driven in particular by pervasive intelligence, i.e., the deployment of on-device and edge AI across large numbers of resource-constrained systems. In such settings, co-locating computation with sensing and memory can reduce data shuttling and improve efficiency. Meanwhile, physical neural approaches have emerged across disparate disciplines, yet progress remains fragmented, with limited shared terminology and few principled ways to compare platforms. This survey unifies the field by mapping neural primitives to substrate-specific mechanisms, analyzing architectural and training paradigms, and identifying key engineering constraints including scalability, precision, programmability, and I/O interfacing overhead. To enable cross-domain comparison, we introduce a first-order benchmarking scheme based on standardized static and dynamic tasks and physically interpretable performance dimensions. We show that no single substrate dominates across the considered dimensions; instead, physical neural systems occupy complementary operating regimes, enabling applications ranging from ultrafast signal processing and in-memory inference to embodied control and in-sample biochemical decision making.

</details>


### [822] [Visualising the Attractor Landscape of Neural Cellular Automata](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10639)
*James Stovold,Mia-Katrin Kvalsund,Harald Michael Ludwig,Varun Sharma,Alexander Mordvintsev*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 该论文应用多种技术（流形学习、拓扑数据分析）来打开神经细胞自动机（NCA）的黑箱，理解其学习行为，发现宏观层面分析能较好捕捉简单流形，而微观层面分析需要更复杂技术处理高度复杂的流形。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着神经细胞自动机（NCAs）在人工生命玩具模型之外的应用日益增多，迫切需要理解它们的行为并建立适当的途径来解释它们学到了什么。NCA训练的好处与其缺乏可解释性相平衡：我们可以设计涌现行为，但理解所学内容的能力有限。

Method: 应用多种技术打开NCA黑箱：包括流形学习技术（主成分分析、密集和稀疏自编码器）以及拓扑数据分析技术（持久同调），从宏观（整个NCA状态）和微观（单个细胞状态）两个层面分析NCA的行为流形。

Result: 结果显示：在宏观层面分析时（将整个NCA状态作为单个数据点），底层流形通常相当简单，能够被很好地捕捉和分析；而在微观层面分析时（将单个细胞状态作为数据点），流形高度复杂，需要更复杂的技术才能理解。

Conclusion: 通过应用多种分析技术，能够在一定程度上理解NCA的学习行为，但需要根据分析层面选择合适的工具：宏观分析相对简单有效，微观分析则需要更先进的技术来处理复杂性。

Abstract: As Neural Cellular Automata (NCAs) are increasingly applied outside of the toy models in Artificial Life, there is a pressing need to understand how they behave and to build appropriate routes to interpret what they have learnt. By their very nature, the benefits of training NCAs are balanced with a lack of interpretability: we can engineer emergent behaviour, but have limited ability to understand what has been learnt.
  In this paper, we apply a variety of techniques to pry open the NCA black box and glean some understanding of what it has learnt to do. We apply techniques from manifold learning (principal components analysis and both dense and sparse autoencoders) along with techniques from topological data analysis (persistent homology) to capture the NCA's underlying behavioural manifold, with varying success.
  Results show that when analysis is performed at a macroscopic level (i.e. taking the entire NCA state as a single data point), the underlying manifold is often quite simple and can be captured and analysed quite well. When analysis is performed at a microscopic level (i.e. taking the state of individual cells as a single data point), the manifold is highly complex and more complicated techniques are required in order to make sense of it.

</details>


### [823] [On the Use of Bi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithms for the Stochastic MKP under Dynamic Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10930)
*Ishara Hewa Pathiranage,Aneta Neumann*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了具有机会约束的随机动态多背包问题，比较了分解式和支配式多目标进化算法在不同不确定性水平和动态变化下的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多背包问题在实际应用中常涉及随机和动态因素，但现有研究对具有机会约束的随机动态多背包问题关注不足，需要探索进化算法在此类问题中的表现。

Method: 将问题建模为双目标优化（利润最大化与概率容量满足），使用四种代表性多目标进化算法（MOEAs），在不确定性水平、置信阈值和动态变化设置下进行实证比较。

Result: 研究结果为分解式和支配式MOEAs在动态约束下的随机多背包问题中的行为提供了比较性见解，展示了算法在不同参数设置下的表现差异。

Conclusion: 该研究为处理具有机会约束的随机动态多背包问题提供了算法比较框架，揭示了不同MOEA范式在动态不确定性环境中的相对优势和适用场景。

Abstract: The multiple knapsack problem (MKP) generalizes the classical knapsack problem by assigning items to multiple knapsacks subject to capacity constraints. It is used to model many real-world resource allocation and scheduling problems. In practice, these optimization problems often involve stochastic and dynamic components. Evolutionary algorithms provide a flexible framework for addressing such problems under uncertainty and dynamic changes. In this paper, we investigate a stochastic and dynamic variant of MKP with chance constraints, where the item weights are modeled as independent normally distributed random variables and knapsack capacities change during the optimization process. We formulate the problem as a bi-objective optimization formulation that balances profit maximization and probabilistic capacity satisfaction at a given confidence level. We conduct an empirical comparison of four widely used multi-objective evolutionary algorithms (MOEAs), representing both decomposition- and dominance-based search paradigms. The algorithms are evaluated under varying uncertainty levels, confidence thresholds, and dynamic change settings. The results provide comparative insights into the behavior of decomposition-based and dominance-based MOEAs for stochastic MKP under dynamic constraints.

</details>


### [824] [Evolving Many Worlds: Towards Open-Ended Discovery in Petri Dish NCA via Population-Based Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11248)
*Uljad Berdica,Jakob Foerster,Frank Hutter,Arber Zela*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出PBT-NCA算法，通过元进化方法演化PD-NCA种群，结合历史行为新颖性和视觉多样性目标，实现长期开放式的复杂自组织现象生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可微分多智能体系统（如PD-NCA）虽然能通过空间竞争产生丰富的自组织，但对超参数高度敏感，容易崩溃为无趣的冻结平衡或结构噪声模式，难以实现持续、开放式的复杂性生成。

Method: 提出PBT-NCA元进化算法，演化PD-NCA种群，采用复合目标函数同时奖励历史行为新颖性和当代视觉多样性，主动惩罚单一文化和死亡状态，维持系统在"混沌边缘"的有效复杂性。

Result: PBT-NCA在长时间尺度上自发产生多种类生命现象：高度规则、协调的周期性波；孢子状散射（同质群体喷射细胞状集群殖民远方）；流体状、形态变化的宏观结构在基质上迁移并保持稳定边界。系统持续维持既非全局有序也非全局随机的有效复杂性状态。

Conclusion: PBT-NCA通过持续进化压力成功实现了真正的开放式复杂性生成，自主发现多样化的形态生存和自组织策略，为人工生命研究提供了新的方法。

Abstract: The generation of sustained, open-ended complexity from local interactions remains a fundamental challenge in artificial life. Differentiable multi-agent systems, such as Petri Dish Neural Cellular Automata (PD-NCA), exhibit rich self-organization driven purely by spatial competition; however, they are highly sensitive to hyperparameters and frequently collapse into uninteresting patterns and dynamics, such as frozen equilibria or structureless noise. In this paper, we introduce PBT-NCA, a meta-evolutionary algorithm that evolves a population of PD-NCAs subject to a composite objective that rewards both historical behavioral novelty and contemporary visual diversity. Driven by this continuous evolutionary pressure, PBT-NCA spontaneously generates a plethora of emergent lifelike phenomena over extended horizons-a hallmark of true open-endedness. Strikingly, the substrate autonomously discovers diverse morphological survival and self-organization strategies. We observe highly regular, coordinated periodic waves; spore-like scattering where homogeneous groups eject cell-like clusters to colonize distant territories; and fluid, shape-shifting macro-structures that migrate across the substrate, maintaining stable outer boundaries that enclose highly active interiors. By actively penalizing monocultures and dead states, PBT-NCA sustains a state of effective complexity that is neither globally ordered nor globally random, operating persistently at the "edge of chaos".

</details>


### [825] [Winner-Take-All Spiking Transformer for Language Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11321)
*Chenlin Zhou,Sihang Guo,Jiaqi Wang,Dongyang Ma,Kaiwei Che,Baiyu Chen,Qingyan Meng,Zhengyu Ma,Yonghong Tian*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出两种基于赢家通吃机制的软最大值免费、脉冲驱动的自注意力模块，构建了用于语言建模的脉冲Transformer架构，在16个NLP数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的脉冲Transformer主要关注视觉任务，而用于语言建模的脉冲Transformer依赖于基于softmax的脉冲自注意力，这会带来高能耗并给神经形态部署带来挑战。

Method: 引入赢家通吃机制到脉冲Transformer中，提出了两种软最大值免费、脉冲驱动的自注意力模块：WTA脉冲自注意力和因果WTA脉冲自注意力。基于这些模块设计了WE-Spikingformer用于掩码语言建模和WD-Spikingformer用于因果语言建模。

Result: 在16个数据集上进行了广泛实验，涵盖自然语言理解、问答任务和常识推理任务，验证了方法的有效性，展示了脉冲Transformer在通用语言建模和节能人工智能方面的潜力。

Conclusion: 提出的基于WTA的软最大值免费脉冲Transformer架构为语言建模提供了有效的解决方案，降低了能耗，推动了脉冲神经网络在通用语言处理任务中的应用。

Abstract: Spiking Transformers, which combine the scalability of Transformers with the sparse, energy-efficient property of Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), have achieved impressive results in neuromorphic and vision tasks and attracted increasing attention. However, existing directly trained spiking transformers primarily focus on vision tasks. For language modeling with spiking transformer, convergence relies heavily on softmax-based spiking self-attention, which incurs high energy costs and poses challenges for neuromorphic deployment. To address this issue, we introduce Winner-Take-All (WTA) mechanisms into spiking transformers and propose two novel softmax-free, spike-driven self-attention modules: WTA Spiking Self-Attention (WSSA) and Causal WTA Spiking Self-Attention (CWSSA). Based on them, we design WTA-based Encoder-only Spiking Transformer (WE-Spikingformer) for masked language modeling and WTA-based Decoder-only Spiking Transformer (WD-Spikingformer) for causal language modeling, systematically exploring softmax-free, spiking-driven Transformer architectures trained end-to-end for natural language processing tasks. Extensive experiments on 16 datasets spanning natural language understanding, question-answering tasks, and commonsense reasoning tasks validate the effectiveness of our approach and highlight the promise of spiking transformers for general language modeling and energy-efficient artificial intelligence.

</details>


### [826] [Beyond LLMs, Sparse Distributed Memory, and Neuromorphics <A Hyper-Dimensional SRAM-CAM "VaCoAl" for Ultra-High Speed, Ultra-Low Power, and Low Cost>](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11665)
*Hiroyuki Chuma,Kanji Otsuka,Yoichi Sato*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 论文提出VaCoAl架构，在确定性超维计算中意外发现路径依赖的语义选择机制，等价于STDP，能解决AI的灾难性遗忘等问题，支持可逆多跳推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决现代AI的局限性：灾难性遗忘、学习停滞和绑定问题，同时实现可逆的多跳推理，补充LLMs的能力。

Method: 基于伽罗瓦域代数的确定性超维计算架构VaCoAl，结合超维内存与确定性逻辑，使用伽罗瓦域扩散解决高维二进制空间的正交化和检索问题。

Result: 在Wikidata约47万导师-学生关系上评估多跳推理，追踪57代（超2550万路径）。发现牛顿-莱布尼茨争议的新解释，观察到从稀疏收敛到"超级高速公路"的相变，支持库恩范式转移。

Conclusion: VaCoAl定义了HDC-AI第三范式，补充LLMs的可逆多跳推理能力，路径依赖的语义选择机制等价于STDP，具有可预测的代数特性。

Abstract: This paper reports an unexpected finding: in a deterministic hyperdimensional computing (HDC) architecture based on Galois-field algebra, a path-dependent semantic selection mechanism emerges, equivalent to spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP), with magnitude predictable a priori by a closed-form expression matching large-scale measurements. This addresses limitations of modern AI including catastrophic forgetting, learning stagnation, and the Binding Problem at an algebraic level. We propose VaCoAl (Vague Coincident Algorithm) and its Python implementation PyVaCoAl, combining ultra-high-dimensional memory with deterministic logic. Rooted in Sparse Distributed Memory, it resolves orthogonalisation and retrieval in high-dimensional binary spaces via Galois-field diffusion, enabling low-load deployment. VaCoAl is a memory-centric architecture prioritising retrieval and association, enabling reversible composition while preserving element independence and supporting compositional generalisation with a transparent reliability metric (CR score). We evaluated multi-hop reasoning on about 470k mentor-student relations from Wikidata, tracing up to 57 generations (over 25.5M paths). Using HDC bundling and unbinding with CR-based denoising, we quantify concept propagation over DAGs. Results show a reinterpretation of the Newton-Leibniz dispute and a phase transition from sparse convergence to a post-Leibniz "superhighway", from which structural indicators emerge supporting a Kuhnian paradigm shift. Collision-tolerance mechanisms further induce path-based pruning that favors direct paths, yielding emergent semantic selection equivalent to STDP. VaCoAl thus defines a third paradigm, HDC-AI, complementing LLMs with reversible multi-hop reasoning.

</details>
